consensus_proxy: company Q1 2026 reported product sales and raised 2026 guidance
mira_view: Current momentum is strongly evidenced, but it is already visible in reported Mounjaro/Zepbound sales and guidance; do not treat it as hidden variant insight.
next_check: next quarterly product sales, prescription trends, realized price commentary
workflow_decision: Use as fact layer; no thesis upgrade without expectation/valuation work.

consensus_proxy: company Q1 2026 presentation and raised CER guidance
mira_view: Novo still has strong GLP-1 commercial evidence, but pricing and competitive dynamics need explicit tracking before treating growth as durable share defense.
next_check: Wegovy pill launch data, GLP-1 TRx share, pricing commentary, peer share shifts
workflow_decision: Use as peer comparison; build exact sales/share table before thesis-system update.

consensus_proxy: FDA approval/label for Foundayo and company launch data for Wegovy pill
mira_view: Oral access is a real category-expansion path, but approval and early uptake are not enough to prove persistence, reimbursement or profit conversion.
next_check: label constraints, payer access, discontinuation, refill persistence, comparative efficacy/safety
workflow_decision: Keep as event-delta variable; do not upgrade to durable thesis yet.

consensus_proxy: company commentary notes lower realized prices/pricing headwinds; no independent payer dataset in package
mira_view: This is the main conversion variable between treated-patient growth and equity value. Current evidence is too thin for a strong conclusion.
next_check: gross-to-net trend, formulary placement, PBM/payer policy, Medicare/commercial coverage
workflow_decision: Mark as key evidence gap and disconfirmation path.

consensus_proxy: management capacity expansion framing and current revenue guidance
mira_view: Capacity is central to Lilly's ability to convert demand, but management commentary must be validated through supply, shortages and launch execution evidence.
next_check: shortage lists, manufacturing milestones, inventory, prescription growth vs supply
workflow_decision: Follow-up item; company claim cannot support thesis alone.

consensus_proxy: company guidance and peer reported launch data; no independent consensus or prescription dataset in package
mira_view: Competition is real, but the current package cannot determine whether share shift is underpriced or over-hyped.
next_check: third-party prescription share, payer access, comparative clinical data, consensus revisions
workflow_decision: Variant-perception not ready; build data table first.

consensus_proxy: category growth narrative plus reported product metrics
mira_view: The first-order variable is durable profitable treated-patient growth, not headline GLP-1 demand. Evidence remains incomplete on persistence and economics.
next_check: adherence/refill persistence, discontinuation, net pricing, expanded indications, safety signals

consensus_proxy: source_gap: no independent consensus estimates, valuation snapshot or sell-side revision table in package
mira_view: Cannot make a strong variant-perception claim yet. Company growth facts may already be substantially expected.
next_check: consensus revenue/EPS revisions, forward multiples, target price dispersion, options/implied expectations
workflow_decision: Do not publish as actionability claim.
